title: UTC-7

infobox.value: is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of −07:00. In North America, it is observed in the [Mountain Time Zone](/wiki/Mountain_Time_Zone "Mountain Time Zone") during [standard time](/wiki/Standard_time "Standard time"), and in the [Pacific Time Zone](/wiki/Pacific_Time_Zone "Pacific Time Zone") during the other eight months (see [daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time")). Some locations use it year-round.
["North American time zones: MST – Mountain Standard Time"](http://www.timeanddate.com/library/abbreviations/timezones/na/mst.html). Time and Date. Retrieved 28 September 2012.
[New Time Zone in Fort Nelson](http://www.timeanddate.com/news/time/fort-nelson-canada-time-zone.html), timeanddate.com, September 21, 2015.

**UTC−07:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of −07:00. In North America, it is observed in the [Mountain Time Zone](/wiki/Mountain_Time_Zone "Mountain Time Zone") during [standard time](/wiki/Standard_time "Standard time"), and in the [Pacific Time Zone](/wiki/Pacific_Time_Zone "Pacific Time Zone") during the other eight months (see [daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time")). Some locations use it year-round.

## As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)")]

Principal cities: [Denver](/wiki/Denver "Denver"), [Salt Lake City](/wiki/Salt_Lake_City "Salt Lake City"), [Calgary](/wiki/Calgary "Calgary"), [Ciudad Juárez](/wiki/Ciudad_Ju%C3%A1rez "Ciudad Juárez")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Mountain Time Zone](/wiki/Mountain_Time_Zone "Mountain Time Zone"))[[1]](#cite_note-1)
  + [Alberta](/wiki/Alberta "Alberta")
  + [British Columbia](/wiki/British_Columbia "British Columbia")[[2]](#cite_note-bc-2)
    - Southeastern communities of [Cranbrook](/wiki/Cranbrook,_British_Columbia "Cranbrook, British Columbia"), [Golden](/wiki/Golden,_British_Columbia "Golden, British Columbia"), [Invermere](/wiki/Invermere,_British_Columbia "Invermere, British Columbia") and [Kimberley](/wiki/Kimberley,_British_Columbia "Kimberley, British Columbia")
  + [Northwest Territories](/wiki/Northwest_Territories "Northwest Territories")
  + [Nunavut](/wiki/Nunavut "Nunavut")
    - [Kitikmeot Region](/wiki/Kitikmeot_Region,_Nunavut "Kitikmeot Region, Nunavut")[[3]](#cite_note-3)
  + [Saskatchewan](/wiki/Saskatchewan "Saskatchewan")
    - [Lloydminster](/wiki/Lloydminster "Lloydminster")
* Mexico (near US border with New Mexico & western Texas)
  + [Chihuahua](/wiki/Chihuahua_(state) "Chihuahua (state)")
    - Municipalities of [Janos](/wiki/Janos_Municipality "Janos Municipality"), [Ascensión](/wiki/Ascensi%C3%B3n_Municipality "Ascensión Municipality"), [Juárez](/wiki/Ju%C3%A1rez_Municipality,_Chihuahua "Juárez Municipality, Chihuahua"), [Práxedis G. Guerrero](/wiki/Pr%C3%A1xedis_G._Guerrero_Municipality "Práxedis G. Guerrero Municipality") and [Guadalupe](/wiki/Guadalupe_Municipality,_Chihuahua "Guadalupe Municipality, Chihuahua")[[4]](#cite_note-cenam-4)
* United States (Mountain Time Zone)[[5]](#cite_note-statoidus-5)
  + [Arizona](/wiki/Arizona "Arizona") – [Navajo Nation](/wiki/Navajo_Nation "Navajo Nation") only (most of Arizona uses MST year-round)
  + [Colorado](/wiki/Colorado "Colorado")
  + [Idaho](/wiki/Idaho "Idaho")[[6]](#cite_note-cornell-6)
    - South of [Salmon River](/wiki/Salmon_River_(Idaho) "Salmon River (Idaho)")
  + [Kansas](/wiki/Kansas "Kansas")
    - Western counties of [Greeley](/wiki/Greeley_County,_Kansas "Greeley County, Kansas"), [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton_County,_Kansas "Hamilton County, Kansas"), [Sherman](/wiki/Sherman_County,_Kansas "Sherman County, Kansas") and [Wallace](/wiki/Wallace_County,_Kansas "Wallace County, Kansas")
  + [Montana](/wiki/Montana "Montana")
  + [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
    - Western counties of [Cherry](/wiki/Cherry_County,_Nebraska "Cherry County, Nebraska") (western part), [Hooker](/wiki/Hooker_County,_Nebraska "Hooker County, Nebraska"), [Arthur](/wiki/Arthur_County,_Nebraska "Arthur County, Nebraska"), [Keith](/wiki/Keith_County,_Nebraska "Keith County, Nebraska"), [Perkins](/wiki/Perkins_County,_Nebraska "Perkins County, Nebraska"), [Chase](/wiki/Chase_County,_Nebraska "Chase County, Nebraska") and [Dundy](/wiki/Dundy_County,_Nebraska "Dundy County, Nebraska"), and all counties to the west of these
  + [Nevada](/wiki/Nevada "Nevada")
    - [West Wendover](/wiki/West_Wendover,_Nevada "West Wendover, Nevada")
  + [New Mexico](/wiki/New_Mexico "New Mexico")
  + [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota")
    - Southwestern counties of [Adams](/wiki/Adams_County,_North_Dakota "Adams County, North Dakota"), [Billings](/wiki/Billings_County,_North_Dakota "Billings County, North Dakota"), [Bowman](/wiki/Bowman_County,_North_Dakota "Bowman County, North Dakota"), [Dunn](/wiki/Dunn_County,_North_Dakota "Dunn County, North Dakota") (southern part), [Golden Valley](/wiki/Golden_Valley_County,_North_Dakota "Golden Valley County, North Dakota"), [Grant](/wiki/Grant_County,_North_Dakota "Grant County, North Dakota"), [Hettinger](/wiki/Hettinger_County,_North_Dakota "Hettinger County, North Dakota"), [McKenzie](/wiki/McKenzie_County,_North_Dakota "McKenzie County, North Dakota") (southern part), [Sioux](/wiki/Sioux_County,_North_Dakota "Sioux County, North Dakota") (west of ND route 31), [Slope](/wiki/Slope_County,_North_Dakota "Slope County, North Dakota") and [Stark](/wiki/Stark_County,_North_Dakota "Stark County, North Dakota")
  + [Oklahoma](/wiki/Oklahoma "Oklahoma")
    - [Kenton](/wiki/Kenton,_Oklahoma "Kenton, Oklahoma")
  + [Oregon](/wiki/Oregon "Oregon")
    - [Malheur County](/wiki/Malheur_County,_Oregon "Malheur County, Oregon") (except a small strip in the south)
  + [South Dakota](/wiki/South_Dakota "South Dakota")
    - Western counties of [Corson](/wiki/Corson_County,_South_Dakota "Corson County, South Dakota"), [Dewey](/wiki/Dewey_County,_South_Dakota "Dewey County, South Dakota"), [Stanley](/wiki/Stanley_County,_South_Dakota "Stanley County, South Dakota") (western part), [Jackson](/wiki/Jackson_County,_South_Dakota "Jackson County, South Dakota") and [Bennett](/wiki/Bennett_County,_South_Dakota "Bennett County, South Dakota"), and all counties to the west of these
  + [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas")
    - Western counties of [Culberson](/wiki/Culberson_County,_Texas "Culberson County, Texas") (northwestern part), [El Paso](/wiki/El_Paso_County,_Texas "El Paso County, Texas") and [Hudspeth](/wiki/Hudspeth_County,_Texas "Hudspeth County, Texas")
  + [Utah](/wiki/Utah "Utah")
  + [Wyoming](/wiki/Wyoming "Wyoming")

## As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Los Angeles](/wiki/Los_Angeles "Los Angeles"), [Tijuana](/wiki/Tijuana "Tijuana")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: North America")]

* Mexico
  + Baja California[[4]](#cite_note-cenam-4)
* United States (Pacific Time Zone)[[5]](#cite_note-statoidus-5)
  + [California](/wiki/California "California")
  + Idaho
    - North of Salmon River[[6]](#cite_note-cornell-6)
  + Nevada (except West Wendover)
  + Oregon
    - All of the state except Malheur County (but including a small strip in the south of Malheur)
  + [Washington](/wiki/Washington_(state) "Washington (state)")

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Phoenix](/wiki/Phoenix,_Arizona "Phoenix, Arizona"), [Hermosillo](/wiki/Hermosillo "Hermosillo"), [Vancouver](/wiki/Vancouver "Vancouver")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9207:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Yukon Time](/wiki/Yukon_Time_Zone "Yukon Time Zone"))
  + [Yukon](/wiki/Yukon "Yukon")
* Canada ([Pacific Time](/wiki/Pacific_Time_(British_Columbia) "Pacific Time (British Columbia)"))
  + British Columbia[[7]](#cite_note-bcgovnews-7)[[8]](#cite_note-dailyhive-8)
    - Except the southeastern communities of Cranbrook, Golden, Kimberley and Invermere[[7]](#cite_note-bcgovnews-7)
* Mexico (*Zona Pacifico*)
  + [Baja California Sur](/wiki/Baja_California_Sur "Baja California Sur")[[4]](#cite_note-cenam-4)
  + [Nayarit](/wiki/Nayarit "Nayarit") (except the municipality of [Bahía de Banderas](/wiki/Bah%C3%ADa_de_Banderas#Municipality "Bahía de Banderas"))
  + [Sinaloa](/wiki/Sinaloa "Sinaloa")
  + [Sonora](/wiki/Sonora "Sonora")
* United States (Mountain Time Zone)
  + Arizona, except the Arizona Navajo Nation, which observes DST
